settings.notes: Read-only market and outcome listing is implemented through the documented Augur v2 subgraph schema. Configure AUGUR_SUBGRAPH_URL or augur_subgraph_url to a maintained GraphQL endpoint. Prices, orderbooks, paper trading, live trading, and copy trading remain unsupported because no maintained official feed/order route is available.

Read-only games, conditions, odds, WebSocket subscriptions, and local paper bet-calculation payloads are implemented through official Azuro APIs. Live posting only accepts pre-signed wallet order payloads and stays disabled by default.

Authenticated read-only market discovery, runner listing, best-offer orderbooks, implied-probability prices, and local paper orders are implemented through the official Betfair Exchange API. Live betting and copy trading remain unsupported.
Verified 2026-05-26: no public documented BetMGM prediction/event-market API, SDK, or automation permission flow is published. Consumer app automation is unsupported.
Verified 2026-05-26: CME event-contract support is blocked by market-data licensing/entitlements and a missing documented broker order route for this app.
Verified 2026-05-26: Context V2 API use requires service credentials, market/order lifecycle validation, and account-specific automation terms that are not available in this local app.
Verified 2026-05-26: published Crypto.com exchange APIs do not expose prediction-market-specific discovery, contract, orderbook, or order endpoints for CDNA/Predict.
Verified 2026-05-26: DraftKings Predictions is published as an app product, but no public documented Predictions API, SDK, or account activity/order automation route is available.
Verified 2026-05-26: Drift BET support is blocked by Solana wallet, margin, settlement, and BET-specific account handling that is not implemented with fixtures and safeguards.
Verified 2026-05-26: no public documented Fact Machine API/SDK or stable protocol integration contract suitable for app discovery, pricing, or order automation is published.
Verified 2026-05-26: Fanatics Markets is a consumer product built with Crypto.com/CDNA, but no public Fanatics Markets API, SDK, or automation terms are published.
Verified 2026-05-26: ForecastEx contracts are broker/member mediated and no direct public self-service ForecastEx market-data plus order API is published for this app.
Verified 2026-05-26: Frenzy Finance requires wallet/network handling, contract validation, and settlement-rule support that is not implemented in this app.

Public prediction-market event discovery, contract listing, orderbooks, implied prices, and local paper orders are implemented through official Gemini Prediction Markets endpoints. Live trading and copy trading remain unsupported.
Verified 2026-05-26: public question pages exist, but no public documented API, SDK, or export endpoint is published. Do not scrape pages or automate private sessions.
Verified 2026-05-26: no stable public Hedgehog Markets API/SDK or documented protocol contract is published for this app's discovery, pricing, order, and settlement model.
Verified 2026-05-26: generic HyperCore/perp/spot APIs are not enough; this app lacks a verified HIP-4 prediction-market catalog/order-normalization contract with fixtures and wallet safeguards.
Verified 2026-05-26: API feeds are described as managed service deliverables, but no public API contract, SDK, or self-service endpoint is published.

Verified 2026-05-26: ForecastTrader/Forecast Contracts require eligible IBKR account permissions and authenticated Web API or TWS/API session handling that cannot be shipped without user-specific entitlements.
Verified 2026-05-26: INFER-pub redirects to RAND Forecasting Initiative public pages, but no public documented API or export contract is published.
Verified 2026-05-26: official quote/history pages exist, but no stable documented API for discovery, contract listing, live quotes, or automated trading is published.

Public question/market discovery, outcome price reads, alerts, and local paper quote payloads are implemented through the official Myriad API. Orderbook reading, live trading, and copy trading remain unsupported.

Read-only market data and paper trading are implemented through official Kalshi REST endpoints. Live trading stays disabled by default and requires API key ID plus RSA private key material from environment variables or an external file.

Read-only market data, orderbooks, and local paper trading are implemented through official Limitless APIs. Live HMAC order posting is guarded by live_trading_enabled and requires environment credentials plus an on-behalf-of profile.

Read-only market discovery, probabilities, and local paper trading are implemented through the official Manifold API. Authenticated MANA betting is guarded by live_trading_enabled and MANIFOLD_API_KEY.

Authenticated read-only post/question discovery and probability reads are implemented through the official Metaculus API. Community Prediction data is access-limited by Metaculus API policy. No trading support exists.

Authenticated market discovery, token listing, token prices, orderbooks, alerts, and local paper orders are implemented through the official Opinion OpenAPI. Live trading and copy trading remain unsupported.
Verified 2026-05-26: Nadex event-contract trading requires eligible exchange account access and no public documented third-party event-contract API is published for this adapter.

Read-only market discovery, outcome listing, AMM marginal-price alerts, and local paper orders are implemented through the documented Omen FixedProductMarketMaker subgraph schema. Configure OMEN_SUBGRAPH_URL or omen_subgraph_url to a maintained GraphQL endpoint. Live trading requires wallet-signed AMM transactions and is not implemented.
Live trading is disabled by default. Keep credentials in .env or environment variables, not in config.json.
Public read-only market-data API support is implemented. Live trading/copy trading are unsupported because no official automation API is documented.

Market discovery, outcome listing, orderbook-derived prices, alerts, and local paper orders are implemented through the official Predict.fun REST API. Live trading and copy trading remain unsupported.
Verified 2026-05-26: no public official PrizePicks developer API for programmatic projections, entries, market data, or automation is published for this app.
Verified 2026-05-26: Probo is a region-limited consumer opinion-market product and does not publish a public official API, SDK, or automation permission flow suitable for this app.
Verified 2026-05-26: Robinhood Prediction Markets is exposed as a consumer brokerage/app product, but no public documented prediction-market API, SDK, or automation permission flow is published.
Verified 2026-05-26: Smarkets API/data use requires account approval and written permission for platform data use, so this app cannot ship working support without user-specific entitlements.

Read-only markets, active-order orderbooks, best odds, WebSocket channel metadata, and local paper trading are implemented through official SX Bet APIs. Live signed order posting is guarded by live_trading_enabled and requires wallet credentials plus funded SX account setup.
Verified 2026-05-26: Thales support requires chain-specific contract/indexer integration, AMM accounting, and explicit wallet transaction handling that this app does not implement.
Verified 2026-05-26: Underdog is a consumer app with eligibility restrictions and no public official API or automation terms for third-party prediction/event-market integration.

Authenticated market discovery, outcome listing, orderbooks, alerts, local paper orders, and guarded signed live order posting are implemented through official XO Markets HMAC endpoints. Live trading remains disabled by default; copy trading is unsupported.

Read-only market discovery, outcome asset price alerts, and local paper orders are implemented through the official Zeitgeist Subsquid/indexer GraphQL shape. Live trading requires wallet-signed Substrate extrinsics and is not implemented.
